message:
fix(grpc): prefer largest lossless unit in format_grpc_timeout

The function was using microseconds for 3500ms (returning "3500000u")
when milliseconds ("3500m") is the conventional choice. Reorder unit
selection to prefer the largest lossless unit that fits in 8 digits,
matching Go/Java gRPC implementations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
